//1: Default handoff agent is `build`, but oh-my-openagent hides `build` and makes
//2: `sisyphus` the implementation primary (with `prometheus` as the planner that
//3: drives `submit_plan`). Point handoff at `sisyphus` so post-approval execution
//4: lands on the active primary agent. Managed by ~/.config/home-manager/opencode.nix.
